title: Signaliscraft Origins
description: A mod that adds Signalis inspired Origins
body:
This mod adds Origins insppired by the Game Signalis:
These being the EULR, ARAR, LSTR, ADLR, STAR, STCR, FKLR, KLBR, MNHR, SAPR.

The EULR offers trade buffs for its relatively weak frame.
The ARAR offers light armor and (unimplemented) a speed buff on interaction with plants.
The LSTR offers light armor and the the ability to survive longer without food.
The ADLR offers slight trade buffs and higher speed.
The STAR offers medium armor and buffed strength.
The STCR offers heavy armor and buffs when being attacked.
The FKLR offers lighter armor and projectiles are ineffective against them.
The KLBR offers small size and projectiles are ineffective against them.
The MNHR offers super-heavy armor and trade buffs but gets debuffed when killing things.
The SAPR offers super-heavy armor and heals when killing things.
